theme-detector.title: Best Shopify Theme Detector 2026
theme-detector.description: Our advanced Shopify Theme Spy uses deep-scan technology to reveal the exact theme and apps behind any successful dropshipping store.

features.title: Deep Scan
features.detail: Detects parent themes even if they are heavily renamed by the owner.

features.title: App Intelligence
features.detail: Identifies over 50+ Shopify apps including Klaviyo, Loox, and PageFly.

features.title: Fast & Lite
features.detail: Powered by lightweight proxies to ensure 3-second results without lag.

faqs.q: How does the Shopify Theme Detector work?
faqs.a: It scans the publicly available liquid files and CSS signatures of a store.

faqs.q: Can I detect themes on password stores?
faqs.a: No, the tool requires the store to be public to read the theme's architecture.

faqs.a: Yes, most names are generated to be short and brandable for easy domain registration.

faqs.q: How many names can I generate?

profit-calculator.title: Shopify Profit & Margin Calculator 2026
profit-calculator.description: Stop guessing your profits. Use our advanced calculator to factor in COGS, shipping, and ad spend to find your true net profit.

features.title: Net Margin Analysis
features.detail: Calculate exactly how much you keep after all expenses.

features.title: ROI Tracker
features.detail: Measure the effectiveness of your ad spend instantly.

features.title: Break-Even Point
features.detail: Know the minimum price you need to sell at to stay in profit.

faqs.q: What is a good profit margin for dropshipping?
faqs.a: Typically, a net profit margin between 15% to 25% is considered healthy.
You can add Shopify transaction fees into the 'Other Costs' field for better accuracy.
